overall.description: A stationary nighttime view of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the wet asphalt as futuristic vehicles drive past the camera. The scene features heavy rain, reflective puddles, and towering futuristic architecture with dense urban canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk city street with neon advertising and traffic

events.description: futuristic blue sedan drives past from right to left across the wet road
dark vehicle stops in the middle of the road, followed by a second vehicle stopping behind it
both stationary vehicles accelerate and drive away down the street

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of traffic from a fixed position on the sidewalk, watching vehicles navigate the rain-soaked street

notable_agents.action: dark futuristic car stops in the middle of the road, blocking the lane briefly before accelerating away
second vehicle approaches and stops behind the first, then follows it down the street

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic display showing a purple-clad figure, casting pink light on the wet street
long horizontal street light spanning across the road, illuminating the rain
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
covered transit shelter with glass panels and digital signage in the median
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the street level

segments.scene_description: A fixed perspective view of a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, dominated by towering glass architecture and vibrant neon holograms. Futuristic vehicles periodically pass through the frame, their headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt. Midway through the segment, two cars perform a brief stopping interaction in the center of the road before accelerating away into the neon-lit urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed perspective of a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that evolves from a steady flow of traffic into a brief moment of urban tension. It begins with a view of towering glass architecture and vibrant neon holograms reflecting across the wet asphalt. As futuristic vehicles periodically glide through the frame, their headlights cast shimmering streaks across the rain-slicked road. The scene then shifts focus as two cars perform a brief stopping interaction in the center of the street, momentarily breaking the rhythm of the city. Finally, the vehicles accelerate away, disappearing back into the depths of the neon-lit urban canyon.
